description: Style Noteadrika captures the mood of the moment with this statement piece designed to snazz up any outfit. Keep the rest of your accessories minimal for maximum impact and style this with a monochrome top. Product DetailsCream and brown beads with a hook and eye closureHas bigger engraved beads at the front and smaller ones at the backMaterial and CareMade of camel bone beads and nickel plated brass beadsWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength: 58 cm
